title: El rosario
writer: Florence L. Barclay, Luis G. Basurto
actors: Andrea Palma, Tomás Perrín, Tana Devodier
plot: Directed by Juan Ortega and set in 19th Century Victorian England, a struggling single woman of the noble class , named Juana Champion (played by actress Andrea Palma), has absolutely no marriage prospects. After finally resigning...
